mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jsh_price_approval (approval_no, depot_head_id, organ_id, delivery_date, remark, total_weight, total_amount, status, create_time, creator, update_time, updater, delete_flag) VALUES (#{approvalNo}, #{depotHeadId}, #{organId}, #{deliveryDate}, #{remark}, #{totalWeight}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{creator}, #{updateTime}, #{updater}, #{deleteFlag})
mapper.select: SELECT id, approval_no as approvalNo, depot_head_id as depotHeadId, organ_id as organId, delivery_date as deliveryDate, remark, total_weight as totalWeight, total_amount as totalAmount, status, delete_flag as deleteFlag, create_time as createTime, creator, update_time as updateTime, updater FROM jsh_price_approval WHERE id=#{id} AND ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'

SELECT id, approval_no as approvalNo, depot_head_id as depotHeadId, organ_id as organId, delivery_date as deliveryDate, status FROM jsh_price_approval WHERE depot_head_id=#{depotHeadId} AND ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT count(1) FROM jsh_price_approval WHERE approval_no LIKE concat('HZ', #{datePrefix}, '%')

SELECT pai.id, pai.approval_id as approvalId, pai.depot_item_id as depotItemId, pai.material_id as materialId, pai.material_extend_id as materialExtendId, pai.bar_code as barCode, pai.name, pai.standard, pai.model, pai.color, pai.brand, pai.oper_number as operNumber, pai.weight, pai.unit_price as unitPrice, pai.all_price as allPrice, pai.tax_rate as taxRate, pai.tax_money as taxMoney, pai.tax_last_money as taxLastMoney, pai.remark, dh.number as billNo, DATE_FORMAT(dh.oper_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as billTimeStr, dh.sales_man as salesMan, mc.name as categoryName, s.supplier as customerName, s.project_name as projectName, m.weight as unitWeight, m.mfrs, di.weight as originalWeight, di.batch_number as batchNumber, di.sku, di.material_unit as materialUnit, dp.name as depotName FROM jsh_price_approval_item pai JOIN jsh_price_approval pa ON pa.id = pai.approval_id JOIN jsh_depot_item di ON di.id = pai.depot_item_id JOIN jsh_depot_head dh ON dh.id = di.header_id JOIN jsh_material m ON m.id = pai.material_id LEFT JOIN jsh_material_category mc ON mc.id = m.category_id LEFT JOIN jsh_supplier s ON s.id = dh.organ_id LEFT JOIN jsh_depot dp ON dp.id = di.depot_id WHERE pai.approval_id = #{approvalId} AND ifnull(pai.delete_flag,'0') != '1' ORDER BY pai.depot_item_id, pai.id

SELECT id, approval_id as approvalId, depot_item_id as depotItemId, material_id as materialId, material_extend_id as materialExtendId, bar_code as barCode, name, standard, model, color, brand, oper_number as operNumber, weight, unit_price as unitPrice, all_price as allPrice, tax_rate as taxRate, tax_money as taxMoney, tax_last_money as taxLastMoney, remark, delete_flag as deleteFlag FROM jsh_price_approval_item WHERE id = #{id} AND ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jsh_price_approval_item (approval_id, depot_item_id, material_id, material_extend_id, bar_code, name, standard, model, color, brand, oper_number, weight, unit_price, all_price, tax_rate, tax_money, tax_last_money, remark, delete_flag) VALUES
(#{item.approvalId}, #{item.depotItemId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialExtendId}, #{item.barCode}, #{item.name}, #{item.standard}, #{item.model}, #{item.color}, #{item.brand}, #{item.operNumber}, #{item.weight}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.allPrice}, #{item.taxRate}, #{item.taxMoney}, #{item.taxLastMoney}, #{item.remark}, '0')
mapper.sql: FROM jsh_depot_head dh LEFT JOIN jsh_supplier s ON s.id = dh.organ_id LEFT JOIN jsh_user u ON u.id = dh.creator
mapper.select:
SELECT dh.id, dh.number as billNo, DATE_FORMAT(dh.oper_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as operTimeStr, s.supplier as customerName, s.project_name as projectName, dh.total_price as totalPrice, dh.link_number as linkNumber, dh.remark, dh.sales_man as salesMan, u.username as userName, round(ifnull(tw.totalWeight, 0), 3) as totalWeight
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT di.header_id, sum(CASE WHEN di.weight IS NOT NULL AND di.weight > 0 THEN di.weight ELSE di.basic_number * ifnull(m.weight, 0) END) as totalWeight FROM jsh_depot_item di LEFT JOIN jsh_material m ON m.id = di.material_id WHERE ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') != '1' GROUP BY di.header_id ) tw ON tw.header_id = dh.id
ORDER BY dh.oper_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM jsh_customer_statement_item csi JOIN jsh_customer_statement cs ON cs.id = csi.statement_id JOIN jsh_price_approval_item pai ON pai.id = csi.depot_item_id WHERE pai.approval_id = #{approvalId} AND ifnull(cs.delete_flag,'0') != '1' AND ifnull(csi.delete_flag,'0') != '1'
